warps.note: South exit left tile — back to Outside
South exit right tile — back to Outside
Floor hole left — drops into Inner Chamber after puzzle solved
Floor hole right — drops into Inner Chamber after puzzle solved
North wall passage — opens after HO-OH word puzzle solved on north wall

tile_layout.notes: 4x5 block chamber (8x10 tiles). Same layout as all four puzzle chambers. Puzzle panel at tiles (3,2)-(4,2). Floor holes at (3,3)-(4,3) after completion. This chamber also calls special HoOhChamber on entry (checks if player has the Rainbow Wing to influence scene).

signs.text: It's a replica of an ancient POKEMON.
It's a replica of an ancient POKEMON.
A POKEMON that flew gracefully on rainbow-colored wings.
Patterns appeared on the walls… [Displays UNOWNWORDS_HO_OH — spells HO-OH in Unown script]
Patterns appeared on the walls… [Displays UNOWNWORDS_HO_OH]. After wall opens: 'There's a big hole in the wall!'

completion_effects: Sets ENGINE_UNLOCKED_UNOWNS_X_TO_Z (unlocks Unown forms X, Y, and Z)
Triggers earthquake and skyfall — player drops through floor to Inner Chamber
Floor blocks at (3,3) and (4,3) change to hole tiles ($18/$19)
puzzle.wall_word_effect: Opens north wall passage to Ho-Oh Item Room (block $2e becomes $30)

events.description: SCENE_RUINSOFALPHHOOHCHAMBER_CHECK_WALL: calls special HoOhChamber first (checks for Rainbow Wing / Ho-Oh encounter conditions), then checks EVENT_WALL_OPENED_IN_HO_OH_CHAMBER. MAPCALLBACK_TILES restores closed floor unless puzzle already solved.
Completing the Ho-Oh puzzle triggers earthquake, shock emote, converts floor tiles to holes, skyfall — player falls into Inner Chamber at warps 2 and 3.

notes: The Ho-Oh Chamber is the north-west puzzle chamber, entered from RuinsOfAlphOutside warp at (2,17). Completing the Ho-Oh sliding tile puzzle unlocks Unown X, Y, and Z — the rarest set, unlocked last if this chamber is done after the others. The north wall displays HO-OH in Unown script. The entry scene calls special HoOhChamber which is linked to the Ho-Oh encounter eligibility check. No NPCs present in this chamber.
